title: Network Segmentation & Troubleshooting Lab
blurb: Living home network lab now running OPNsense on an HP t730, with multi-VLAN segmentation, controller-based Wi-Fi, Pi-hole DNS filtering, Grafana monitoring, and real cross-VLAN troubleshooting scenarios.
readme: Hands-on network lab using OPNsense, a Zyxel GS1920, Cisco SG300, Cisco WLC/APs, and a Debian monitoring host to implement VLAN 10/20/30/99 segmentation, firewall policy enforcement, DNS filtering, observability, and repeatable troubleshooting evidence.
proof: Project-backed VLAN, firewall, wireless and monitoring evidence.

title: Ticket Triage Dashboard
blurb: Full-stack service desk–style ticket triage dashboard featuring filtering, status updates, self-assignment, and live metrics, built with React and a RESTful Node.js API.
readme: Demonstrates realistic first-line IT support workflows using an API-driven React frontend, including optimistic updates, assignment handling, and operational metrics.
proof: Support-style workflow project for triage, ownership and status tracking.

title: API Troubleshooting Lab
blurb: Multi-service API troubleshooting lab for isolating gateway and backend failures, using request tracing, structured logging, controlled failure simulation, Postman scenarios, screenshots, and pytest-backed evidence.
readme: Demonstrates practical fault isolation across a FastAPI gateway and Flask backend, including X-Request-ID tracing, API key/auth failures, XML validation, simulated upstream errors, timeouts, rate limiting, and repeatable tests.
proof: Evidence of structured fault isolation, logging and API debugging.

title: WarehouseOne — Internal Ordering & WMS
blurb: Python/Flask + Postgres + Docker. RBAC, stock lifecycle, future courier flows.
readme: Auth, RBAC, picking/packing, API-first. Devcontainer + Compose.
proof: Internal ordering and warehouse workflow concept.

title: Well-Architected Static Site
blurb: S3 + CloudFront + WAF + OAC, built with Terraform and GitHub Actions.
readme: Security headers, budgets, and CI checks baked in.
proof: AWS static-site architecture built with Terraform and deployment discipline.

title: Serverless CRUD (API Gateway + Lambda + DynamoDB)
blurb: Cognito auth, fine-grained IAM; Lambda aliases for canary releases.
readme: Blue/green via aliases; unit tests; OpenAPI spec.
proof: Serverless CRUD API concept using managed AWS services.

title: Event-Driven Image Pipeline
blurb: S3 -> EventBridge -> Lambda thumbnails -> notify via SNS.
readme: CloudWatch dashboards + alarms; sample images + demo script.

title: IaC VPC Baseline
blurb: Public/private subnets, NAT, SGs, SSM Session Manager bastion.
readme: Security groups opinionated defaults; cost + security notes.

title: Amazon Connect Call-Quality Monitor
blurb: Dashboards + alarms for latency/AHT signals; sample Contact Lens notes.
readme: Edge test utility + CW metrics; runbook included.
proof: Amazon Connect monitoring and dashboard concept.

title: Containerised App on ECS Fargate
blurb: Operational readiness lab deploying a Dockerised FastAPI app to ECS Fargate with Terraform, ECR, an Application Load Balancer, CloudWatch logs, and verified health checks.
readme: Terraform-managed dev deployment in eu-west-2 with ECS, ALB routing, CloudWatch log evidence, and an operations-focused troubleshooting runbook.
proof: Verified ALB health endpoints, ECS service state, and CloudWatch health-check evidence from a completed Fargate lab deployment.
